title: Macroplan
description: A week-by-week delivery plan. Portable TOML format v1 — see docs/format.md. Validates the TOML-decoded structure; dates are TOML date literals, surfaced to JSON Schema as date-formatted strings.

macroplan_version.description: Format version. Omit for the current version (1). A newer version must be rejected by a consumer that only understands 1.

title.description: Display name of the plan. Defaults to "Untitled Macroplan" when absent.

start.description: Optional left edge of the plan's week span. Only extends the span; never clips a feature. Snapped to its ISO-week Monday.

end.description: Optional right edge of the plan's week span. Only extends the span; never clips a feature. Snapped to its ISO-week Monday.

feature.description: The features of the plan. Written as [[feature]] blocks. Names must be unique.

date.description: A calendar date (TOML date literal, e.g. 2026-06-15). Snapped to its ISO-week Monday.

name.description: Identifies the feature; the join key for a milestone's `requires`. Must be unique within the plan.

original.description: The Original Estimate — the immovable baseline all lateness is judged against (ADR-0001).

reestimates.description: Each later week the estimate slipped to. Order-independent.

delivered.description: The week the feature actually shipped. Absent means still in flight.

status.description: In-flight confidence. Meaningful only while undelivered. Lateness is derived, never authored.

requires.description: Feature names that must be delivered on/before `week` to meet the milestone.
